parameters: Huh... wasn't I in Shino's room...?
アニメーションタイプ = def
Hey, Kurumizawa. Could you fill in that idiot too, regarding the announcement I just gave?
Anyways, from tomorrow onwards, feel free to attend classes as you please until summer
vacation... And that wraps up today's class.
スライドスピード = def
I'm the one who has to clean up after you, you know? Get it together~
She's making a really troubled face, right beside me.
\sa[124]\SM[jump]I worry for your future, Kurumizawa-san~, with your man like this.
スライドスピード = def
アニメーションタイプ = def
\sa[124]\SM[jump]That's right~, you've got a cutie like her as your girlfriend
so you gotta take good care of her, you know~?
スライドスピード = def
スライドスピード = def
\SA[124]Wahahah, you sure are popular, \n[1]. Even though you're actually dating her yet~.
\sa[130]\SE[29]I know, right~?.... We just live next door to each other,
and everyone knows that too... and still they're like that.

She's pretty popular herself, so someone's gonna snatch her up if you don't get it together, 
you know?
That's right~! We all want to shoot our shot too, you know~!
The boys of the class all react to Jun's fanning. It's almost like a regular event in our class,
for me to deny it all and for everyone to then go home.
Even I know just how popular she is, both inside and outside the school.
She has top grades, is homely as hell, and her looks are fantastic....
and her femininity is just off the charts, really.
But still, the dozen or so years we've spent as 'family'
just keep getting in the way of us building a real relationship.
Though, in the end, it's just that I'm too much of a coward, really.
The moment I was about to spit out the words to brush it all off--
...The dream I just had came back to me.
Shino, there's stuff I gotta talk to you about, on the way back.
Shino, there's stuff I gotta talk to you about, on the way back.
The unusual response made her flustered, and the surroundings noisy.
In the classroom filled with the shrills of the girls and the boos of the boys,
I took and pulled Shino's hand, and replied as such:
\sa[130]\SM[tremble]\SE[9]Eh? Eh? Eeeeh? Hey, wait, my heart's not...
And so with that, we headed to a cafe downtown, for this important topic.

--It's probably gonna get real annoying, making attendance from tomorrow. 
Good thing we've got free days from tomorrow.
\sa[130]\SM[tremble]\SE[28]???? Eh, is this a dream? Fueeeeeeh--...
アニメーションタイプ = def

I wonder who put this on my desk?

I wonder who put this on my desk?
\SA[汗]I mean, it's not like I haven't ever wanted class to go by faster, for sure.

I wonder who put this on my desk?
It'd be nice if we could really do that though, so much time would be saved.
\SM[nod][You can see past scenes at the hospital]?
I wonder who put this on my desk?
but seems like it's got some other stuff going for it.
